---
title: 'Gateway Church - Southlake, TX (And other locations throughout DFW)'
date: '2013-09-10T04:11:00.0040000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Church Finder'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8436960798555038892'
blogger_filename: '/2013/09/gateway-church-southlake-tx-and-other.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Church Finder/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Texas'
---

Gateway Church<br />
Founder Pastor: Robert Morris<br />
<br />
<a href="http://gatewaypeople.com/services" target="_blank">http://gatewaypeople.com/services</a> <br />
<br />
<br />
<div class="views-field-field-campus-address-value">
<span class="field-content">700 Blessed Way</span>
  </div>
<span class="views-field-field-campus-city-value">
                <span class="field-content">Southlake,</span>
  </span>
  
  <span class="views-field-field-campus-state-value">
                <span class="field-content">Texas</span>
  </span>
  
  <span class="views-field-field-campus-zip-value">
                <span class="field-content">76092</span>
  </span>
  
  <br />
<div class="views-field-field-campus-office-phone-value">
<label class="views-label-field-campus-office-phone-value">
        Phone:
      </label>
                <span class="field-content">817.328.1000</span>
  </div>
<div class="views-field-field-campus-fax-value">
<label class="views-label-field-campus-fax-value">
        Fax:
      </label>
                <span class="field-content">817.416.5701</span></div>
<div class="views-field-field-campus-fax-value">
</div>
<div class="views-field-field-campus-fax-value">
<span class="field-content">Also:</span></div>
<div class="views-field-field-campus-fax-value">
</div>
<div class="views-field-field-campus-fax-value">
<div class="views-field-field-campus-address-value">
<span class="field-content">2404 N Carrier Parkway</span>
  </div>
<span class="views-field-field-campus-city-value">
                <span class="field-content">Grand Prairie,</span>
  </span>
  
  <span class="views-field-field-campus-state-value">
                <span class="field-content">Texas</span>
  </span>
  
  <span class="views-field-field-campus-zip-value">
                <span class="field-content">75050</span>&nbsp;</span></div>
<div class="views-field-field-campus-fax-value">
</div>
<div class="views-field-field-campus-fax-value">
<div class="views-field-field-campus-address-value">
<span class="field-content">7501 Davis Blvd</span>
  </div>
<span class="views-field-field-campus-city-value">
                <span class="field-content">North Richland Hills,</span>
  </span>
  
  <span class="views-field-field-campus-state-value">
                <span class="field-content">Texas</span>
  </span>
  
  <span class="views-field-field-campus-zip-value">
                <span class="field-content">76182</span>
  </span>
  
  <br />
<div class="views-field-field-campus-office-phone-value">
<label class="views-label-field-campus-office-phone-value">
        Phone:
      </label>
                <span class="field-content">817.328.1000</span>
  </div>
<div class="views-field-field-campus-fax-value">
<label class="views-label-field-campus-fax-value">
        Fax:
      </label>
                <span class="field-content">817.416.5701</span>&nbsp;</div>
<div class="views-field-field-campus-fax-value">
</div>
<div class="views-field-field-campus-fax-value">
<div class="views-field-field-campus-address-value">
<span class="field-content">7125 Legacy Drive</span>
  </div>
<span class="views-field-field-campus-city-value">
                <span class="field-content">Frisco,</span>
  </span>
  
  <span class="views-field-field-campus-state-value">
                <span class="field-content">TX</span>
  </span>
  
  <span class="views-field-field-campus-zip-value">
                <span class="field-content">75034</span>&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></div>
<div class="views-field-field-campus-fax-value">
</div>
<div class="views-field-field-campus-fax-value">
<div class="views-field-field-campus-address-value">
<span class="field-content">4209 Basswood Blvd</span>
  </div>
<span class="views-field-field-campus-city-value">
                <span class="field-content">Fort Worth,</span>
  </span>
  
  <span class="views-field-field-campus-state-value">
                <span class="field-content">TX</span>
  </span>
  
  <span class="views-field-field-campus-zip-value">
                <span class="field-content">76137</span>
  </span>
  
  <br />
<div class="views-field-field-campus-office-phone-value">
<label class="views-label-field-campus-office-phone-value">
        Phone:
      </label>
                <span class="field-content">817.552.7581</span>&nbsp;</div>
<div class="views-field-field-campus-office-phone-value">
</div>
<div class="views-field-field-campus-office-phone-value">
</div>
</div>
<span class="views-field-field-campus-zip-value">&nbsp;</span><span class="field-content">&nbsp;</span>
  </div>
